name: Bad Omens: 8th Apartment
short_description: You play as a student named Lisa, who has just moved in with her university friend. But instead of a carefree student life, Lisa faces events full of despair and fear when she is left alone in her apartment number 8...
detailed_description:
You play as a student named Lisa, who has just moved in with her university friend. But instead of a carefree student life, Lisa faces events full of despair and fear when she is left alone in her apartment number 8.



8th Apartment is the first game in the Bad Omens series. This game is for people who like domestic horror. There are no endless corridors and searching for keys in the corners of locations. In this game you live your ordinary life, but you encounter unexplained, at first glance, phenomena. You have to figure out if something supernatural is happening in this place or is it all just a series of random coincidences?

Your actions affect how the story ends. Will you be able to find the most favorable outcome for the protagonist?


Recommendations

We recommend putting on headphones and turning off the lights for the best experience.


Health and Safety Information

Epilepsy warning:
If you have ever had an epileptic seizure, consult your doctor before playing. Flashing images may trigger a seizure even if you have not previously experienced symptoms of epilepsy.

supported_languages: English, German, Spanish - Spain, Simplified Chinese, Portuguese - Portugal, Russian, Indonesian, Japanese, French, Arabic, Hindi
